name: libnet-libidn2-perl
title: libnet-libidn2-perl
description:
Perl bindings for GNU Libidn2
Net::LibIDN2 provides bindings for GNU Libidn2, a C library for handling
internationalized domain names based on IDNA 2008, Punycode and TR46.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnet-libidn2-perl because Perl bindings for GNU Libidn2.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnet-libidn2-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnet-libidn2-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnet-libidn2-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
